rules.styling: CSS variables and package CSS; no static visual inline styles
rules.status: Check docs/metadata/component-status.json before using planned components

scrollModes.page: Use for simple pages where the document scrolls normally.
scrollModes.content: Use for admin/docs apps with persistent navigation and main content scrolling.
scrollModes.split: Use for workspaces where sidebar and main content scroll independently.

AppShell.rule: Do not fix persistent navigation with one-off app CSS when AppShell props can express the layout. AppShell wraps sidebar content in vf-app-shell__sidebar-scroll so long persistent sidebars can scroll independently.

SideNav.layoutRule: SideNav renders header and footer outside vf-side-nav__scroll; keep long navigation items inside the component list rather than adding app-owned scroll wrappers.

Field.relationshipRule: Use Field's render-function child when it should supply the native control id, aria-describedby, invalid, required, and disabled props. For a static child, pair Field htmlFor with the child control id. Do not expect Field to clone arbitrary children.
Field.validationRule: Use error, warning, success, or message for standard field feedback. Error uses alert semantics through ValidationMessage.

NativeFormControls.rule: TextInput, SearchInput, Textarea, Checkbox, Select, Radio, RadioGroup, Switch, NumberInput, DateInput, DateTimeInput, Rating, and Slider remain native controls. Keep value/defaultValue/onChange ownership in the application and do not add form or date libraries for basic workflows.

SelectionControls.rule: Use Switch for persistent settings, ToggleButton for active tools or views, ToggleButtonGroup for related compact tools, SegmentedControl for small stable exclusive options, RadioGroup for spacious form choices, and Checkbox for independent Boolean values. Use Autocomplete for known single-value option sets that benefit from label search. Use TransferList for bounded available-to-assigned workflows; use UniversalDataGrid or a dedicated assignment page for large, server-managed, or permission-heavy resources.

Toast.rule: Use ToastProvider and useToast for transient operation feedback only. Use ValidationMessage for fields, Alert/InlineMessage for persistent contextual feedback, Dialog/ConfirmDialog for blocking workflows, and app-owned state for notification history.

Overlays.rule: Popover, Menu, Dropdown, Tooltip, Dialog, Drawer, and ConfirmDialog use a shared private portal, dismissal, focus, scroll-lock, and anchored-positioning foundation. Use Menu for actions, Dropdown for generic floating content, and Select for form values. Autocomplete must reuse this foundation and must not add its own portal, dismissal, or positioning engine.
